PARTNERSHIPS

DIGITAL
CAREERS
FR

At Attraction, our employees are our greatest strength. That’s why we strive to recruit the best talent in Quebec and Canada. If you have the attitude and ambition to achieve great things, we’d love to meet you.

Time for a coffee?
~

Many positions will be posted here, but do not hesitate to send us a spontaneous application to rh@attraction.ca

OUR OFFICES
We have put a lot of love into the Attraction work environment and the positive impact that this creates in the daily lives of our teams is tangible.

Whether it is the coffee area, the multiple meeting rooms, or the cafeteria, each environment is designed to make tasks more pleasant, stimulate creativity, and encourage meetings.

 
 

An award-winning leader in the production, creation and distribution of content since 2002, Attraction is a major player in the North American entertainment industry.
